title: The Weekly Challenge - 110
task1_desc: You are given a text file. Write a script to display all valid phone numbers in the given text file. ## Acceptable Phone Number Formats +nn nnnnnnnnnn (nn) nnnnnnnnnn nnnn nnnnnnnnnn ## Input File 0044 1148820341 +44 1148820341 44-11-4882-0341 (44) 1148820341 00 1148820341 ## Output 0044 1148820341 +44 1148820341 (44) 1148820341
task1_body: You are given a text file. Write a script to display all valid phone numbers in the given text file. ## Acceptable Phone Number Formats +nn nnnnnnnnnn (nn) nnnnnnnnnn nnnn nnnnnnnnnn ## Input File 0044 1148820341 +44 1148820341 44-11-4882-0341 (44) 1148820341 00 1148820341 ## Output 0044 1148820341 +44 1148820341 (44) 1148820341
task2_desc:
You are given a text file.

Write a script to transpose the contents of the given file.
task2_body:
You are given a text file. Write a script to transpose the contents of the given file. ## Input File name,age,sex Mohammad,45,m Joe,20,m Julie,35,f Cristina,10,f ## Output: name,Mohammad,Joe,Julie,Cristina age,45,20,35,10 sex,m,m,f,f
Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 2nd May 2021**.
